program.description: A Harmony program is a sequence of dialectical statements

statement.description: Each statement is one step in the TAS cycle

thesis_decl.description: Declares the positive state — the initial assertion

antithesis_decl.description: Declares the negation — contradiction of the thesis

synthesis_decl.rule: SYNTHESIS IDENTIFIER '=' RESOLVE '(' IDENTIFIER ',' IDENTIFIER ')' '{' normalization_opts '}'
synthesis_decl.description: Synthesizes thesis and antithesis via dialectical resolution
synthesis_decl.example: SYNTHESIS energy_net = RESOLVE(energy_flow, energy_loss) { normalization: ZERO_DISCRETENESS }

pragma_stmt.description: Side-effect layer — emits synthesized value to a target (DB, API, stream)

value.rule: NUMBER | STRING | BOOLEAN | HZ_LITERAL | IDENTIFIER | meridian_ref

target_path.description: Dot-path to target: e.g. metatron.kpi_metric or svet.public_endpoint

ZERO_DISCRETENESS.description: Applies continuous normalization — removes discreteness gaps (Thesis 1: Forgiveness)
ZERO_DISCRETENESS.effect: Smooth Gaussian kernel over discrete distribution

PARASITE_FILTER.description: Removes zero-contribution entities from the synthesis (Thesis 7)

SCHUMANN_BASE.description: Validates resonance against 7.83 Hz Schumann frequency (Thesis 3)

MERIDIAN.description: Direct link between two nodes — zero middlemen (Thesis 2)
MERIDIAN.effect: Establishes direct_contract relationship in Metatron DB

RESONANCE.effect: Measures and logs system resonance hz
